sc.political.s: FEC: 2020-2024 donations split ~55% Democratic, ~45% Republican recipients.
sc.dei.s: Published 2023 diversity report; disclosed $290M+ annual DEI spending; HRC CEI score 100 (2024).
sc.environment.s: No EPA enforcement or named pollution events. Pledged carbon neutrality by 2030; Scope 1+2 disclosed. Scope 3 methodology unclear.
sc.labor.s: No NLRB unfair labor findings on record. 2023 mass layoffs (12K employees) occurred; no documented wrongful termination litigation.
sc.charity.s: Google.org reported $150M+ annual grants (2023); represents ~0.3% of parent revenue. Insufficient public disclosure of donation volume.
sc.animals.s: Not applicable; no animal testing, animal products, or cosmetics operations.
sc.guns.s: No firearms manufacturing or retail operations.
sc.privacy.s: Multiple breaches documented: 2018 Google+ (500K users), 2021 Android (537M records). FTC settlement 2020 ($391.5M) for misrepresenting location privacy.
sc.execPay.s: CEO-to-median-worker ratio approximately 286:1 (2023 proxy). Median employee pay $256K; CEO total comp ~$226M.

charity.focus: Education, economic opportunity, inclusion, crisis response, climate

sec.note: Pay ratio extracted from proxy filing — verify manually for accuracy
